scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace apps/api run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace apps/api run lint
scripts.android:sync: npm run android:build-web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug
